approvalSource: Steve said "go" after the Phase G plan identified GATE-PERFORMANCE-001 as the first slice because the Wave Cleanup B wrapper run was too slow.
notes: Approval covers a narrow v1 performance slice only: remove the duplicate foundation:verify call inside the foundation ship wrapper, run independent fanout gates in parallel, keep strict mode available, and print per-step timing. It does not approve the rest of Phase G for build.
